name: team-task-manager
description: Full-stack team task management application with React, Express, Prisma, PostgreSQL, JWT auth, and Railway deployment support.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server
scripts.railway:start: npm run db:migrate && npm run start -w server
